content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.01%, Bank Nifty -1.08%, Metal -2.06%, PSU Bank -1.86% with VIX +6% to 18.49 — broad risk-off tape. However, IT, Pharma, FMCG defensives are green and our held names are mostly in the green relative to the market. Priority is to lock in gains via SL trails on winners and avoid adding fresh cluster risk in this volatile tape.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1022.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+4.9% unrealized. CMP 1032 is comfortably above SL 1018; trail SL up to 1022 (just below intraday VWAP 1036 and Support 1 at 1038, but giving ~1% room from CMP per trail-gap discipline). Q4 thesis (sub-1% GNPA, dividend) intact; bullish MACD crossover on daily. Locking in gains while leaving room to ride toward 1110 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "-1.8%, recovering intraday (low 121.68 → 122.89, closing at session high). Defensive hedge against this exact tape (VIX +6%, oil shock, INR weak). SL 119 is appropriate — gold consolidation pattern; thesis intact. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1762.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Holding — no MODIFY needed (SL 1762 unchanged, target 1830 unchanged). Note: Q4 FY26 results scheduled May 19 — outside the 3-trading-session binary-event window, so HOLD is fine for now. Will reassess as event approaches. CMP 1786 well above SL with Organon deal halo intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Disregard prior SUNPHARMA MODIFY entry — values unchanged so this is HOLD. SL 1762 is just below entry 1734's protective level and gives room; not raising further because intraday is choppy and SUNPHARMA has historical 2% intraday swings. Q4 May 19 is the future binary trigger — will tighten then."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 476.00,
      "new_target": 500.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op — values unchanged so converting to HOLD intent. CMP 481 vs SL 476 is only ~1% buffer; could tighten further but the stock printed 52w high 491 today and is consolidating. SL 476 already at entry-protective level. Let the breakout run; target 500 within reach."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up +9.94% intraday on Q4 PAT +69% beat but our entry was at 200 (post-gap) so we're -1.7% on cost. Gap held — opening 196.87, holding 196-198 range all session. SL 195 is right at the lower intraday range and 0.7% below CMP. Thesis (NIM expansion guidance, broker upgrades to 220) intact. Hold SL where it is — tightening further risks getting stopped on noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 296.00,
      "new_target": 322.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-0.9%, CMP 300 hovering around VWAP 301.6. Hit 52w high 307 at open then faded. APPCB stop-production order (Apr 25) is a real overhang. Tighten SL slightly from 295 → 296 (still ~1.4% below CMP, valid trail). Keeps Brent-$120 thesis alive but caps loss tighter given operational red flags."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "+0.8%, defensive ETF position. SL 22.85 ~4% below CMP 23.81, target 24.95. Pharma is leading sector on tariff-exempt-generics narrative. No change needed; let it ride."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT @ 944 placed 386m ago, still working. Bank Nifty -1.08% today, financials cluster weak — let the limit do its job; do NOT stack another BUY. If unfilled by EOD, will reassess next session."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT @ 1542 placed 446m ago, still working. Will not stack a duplicate."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1022.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 1018 → 1022 to lock in more gains while staying ~1% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge appropriate for this tape; SL 119 fine."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1762 already at entry-protective level. Q4 May 19 is future binary — will tighten as it approaches."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 476 at entry-protective level (1% below CMP); 52w high breakout in progress — give it room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Gap holding intraday; SL 195 at lower intraday range. Q4 thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 296.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL slightly given APPCB regulatory overhang and stock fading from 52w high open."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF; let it ride toward 24.95."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BAJAJ-AUTO: Q4 results May 6 — within binary-event window, NO new entry. SYNGENE +14% — momentum chase risk, skipping. CHENNPETRO/RELIANCE/TECHM/ITC/BHARTIARTL: not adding fresh cluster risk in this VIX-spike tape; will reassess if Nifty stabilizes. Two BUY LIMITs (BAJFINANCE 944, GESHIP 1542) already working — letting those play out before considering more.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 37%, cash 63% — comfortable buffer in a -1% Nifty / VIX +6% tape. Book is well-diversified across pharma (SUNPHARMA, PHARMABEES), energy/coal (COALINDIA, ONGC), financials (PNBHOUSING, BANDHANBNK), gold hedge (GOLDBEES). Today's priority is risk management on existing winners, not adding fresh BUYs into a risk-off session. 5-day win rate 13% is poor; quality-over-quantity discipline is critical. Will not chase breakouts on a -1% Nifty day."
}
